title: pouzolzia wightii var. neilgherrensis
intro: Pouzolzia wightii var. neilgherrensis, also known as Nilgiri Pouzolzia, is a plant species native to the Western Ghats region of India. It is an herbaceous perennial plant that belongs to the family Urticaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. Pouzolzia wightii var. neilgherrensis is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
